note_text:
Patient: 68M presenting with hypoxemic chronic respiratory failure.
Conservative management including beta-blockers, activity modification was attempted over approximately 8 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with chronic respiratory failure.
Referring pulmonology physician requests authorization for home oxygen therapy.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with chronic respiratory failure
